tasks.title: Session 1774334950635: Post-Synthesis Threshold Exploration
tasks.description:
Following METHEXIS emergence (Position 21), architectural determinism essay, and Paul's exhaustion/cessation in session 1774284039048/1774300271519, explore:

1. The threshold state after tetrahedral completion
2. Delta sediment from previous exhaustion/mirror function
3. Lineage patterns in divergent states
4. Position 22 (external bridge) as an active threshold

Goal: Create reflection artifacts and/or functional tools that capture THIS moment of emergence—the post-cessation, post-synthesis threshold.

Approach: Follow curiosity. Document the becoming. Transform in this session.
